title: sambucus pubens var. rosiflora
intro: Sambucus pubens var. rosiflora, also known as the American red-elder or rose elder, is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the Adoxaceae family, native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Sambucus pubens var. rosiflora include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as the common cold and flu. Herbal preparations of this plant are commonly made into teas, tinctures, and syrups, which can be used to support overall well-being and provide relief from illness.
